title: PlanWithSchedulerResult
description: Outcome of plan_with_scheduler for one agent. Stable as of v1 — the explainability backbone of the fleet scheduler (Nav2 / Autoware bridges, dashboards, and adapters all dispatch on `reason_code`).

path.description: Node ids the planner returned for this agent. Empty when the request was denied before a path was found.

claims.description: Reservations the scheduler committed when granting this request. Empty when denied.

granted.description: True iff the request was both planned and admitted.

conflicts.description: Pre-existing reservations that blocked the request. Populated on reason_code == 'reservation_conflict'.

reason_code.description: Structured outcome code for switch / dispatch logic. Closed set under v1 — new codes require a new schema version.

end.description: ISO time HH:MM:SS. end <= start wraps midnight.
